policy: All hyperparameter selection must use DEV/validation only. Test/private test must remain frozen.
provisional_reason: No complete shared-LLM DEV trial logs, selection-criterion evidence, or selected-run artifacts are attached yet. Do not treat configs/frozen/* as empirically locked paper freezes.
required_to_promote_from_provisional: shared LLM provider/model/version matching main project
DEV search space + all trial metrics under outputs/tuning/
explicit statement that test/private test were not used
forbidden: tuning on test or private test
injecting target-system Safety Checker / SAFE-Router / HITL logic
claiming freeze is final without DEV evidence
note: Populate outputs/tuning/* with actual shared-LLM DEV search logs before promoting freeze_status to locked.
